coverage_denominators.missing_coverage_rule: Missing target coverage stays missing: never imputed as zero-hit, backfilled, or substituted; rates are null when the denominator is 0.
coverage_denominators.never_mix: ticket-slot-level and target-level denominators are never mixed
coverage_denominators.target_any_ticket_level: COVERED_TARGETS_ONLY (targets in window with >=1 valid slot)
coverage_denominators.ticket_slot_level: VALID_SUBMITTED_TICKET_SLOTS (valid submitted ticket slots whose target is in the window)

_notes.EXACT_PRIZE_TIER: Structural tier is derivable from (main_hit_count, special_hit), but the committed prize-tier scorer semantics and an exact monetary tier mapping are NOT re-derived here; treat as partial.
_notes.PAYOUT_EV_ROI: No payout/odds/pool/ROI data is read or computed. A local scorer endpoint must never be converted into an official prize, payout, or ROI.

local_historical_measurement_disclaimer: 本資料為本地歷史回放量測 (local historical replay measurement)。非預測、非推薦、非排名、非下注建議；全部歷史窗格 (REFERENCE_ALL_ELIGIBLE) 僅供參考，不得用於策略晉級、挑選或部署。
measurement_only_notice: MEASUREMENT_AND_SCHEMA_FEASIBILITY_ONLY. Not a ranking, portfolio, random baseline, p-value, candidate classification, recommendation, prediction-success claim, payout, ROI, or official-prize statement. Rows are lexical and unranked.

_notes.EXACT_PRIZE_TIER: Structural tier is derivable from (main_hit_count, special_hit), but the committed prize-tier scorer semantics and an exact monetary tier mapping are NOT re-derived here; treat as partial.
_notes.PAYOUT_EV_ROI: No payout/odds/pool/ROI data is read or computed. A local scorer endpoint must never be converted into an official prize, payout, or ROI.

files.canonical_target_windows.json: Frozen 50/300/750/all windows: target ids (asc) + sha256 digests.
files.pairwise_ticket_overlap_diagnostics.json: C(11,2)=55 pairs x 4 windows; numbers-only overlap.
files.per_strategy_prize_aware_distribution.js: Special / m2_and_special / prize-aware at both levels + support status.

level_distinction.TARGET_ANY_TICKET: Per target via best ticket; denominator = covered targets only.
level_distinction.TICKET_SLOT: Per submitted ticket slot; denominator = valid submitted ticket slots.
level_distinction.WARNING: A UI must never mix ticket-slot-level and target-level denominators.

big649_measurement_export_schema.measurement_only_notice: MEASUREMENT_AND_SCHEMA_FEASIBILITY_ONLY. Not a ranking, portfolio, random baseline, p-value, candidate classification, recommendation, prediction-success claim, payout, ROI, or official-prize statement. Rows are lexical and unranked.

pairwise_fields.exact_cross_strategy_duplicate_ticket_co: sum over shared targets of |ticketsA & ticketsB|
pairwise_fields.main_number_set_jaccard_mean/min/max: Jaccard of per-target union of main numbers
pairwise_fields.pairwise_unique_ticket_union_count: sum over shared targets of |ticketsA | ticketsB|

big649_measurement_export_schema.purpose: Field guide for a FUTURE read-only BIG649 strategy-analysis UI/API. This schema defines fields only; it does not authorize implementation.

redundancy_fields.global_unique_exact_ticket_count: distinct 6-number sets across the whole window (diversity)
redundancy_fields.targets_with_one_or_more_duplicate_slots: count of targets with within-target duplicates
redundancy_fields.within_target_unique_ticket_count: sum over covered targets of distinct ticket-sets

target_level_fields.max_m0_count..max_m6_count: targets whose best ticket has exactly K main hits; sum==covered

canonical_target_windows.measurement_only_notice: MEASUREMENT_AND_SCHEMA_FEASIBILITY_ONLY. Not a ranking, portfolio, random baseline, p-value, candidate classification, recommendation, prediction-success claim, payout, ROI, or official-prize statement. Rows are lexical and unranked.
canonical_target_windows.nesting_assertion: RECENT_50 subset RECENT_300 subset RECENT_750 subset REFERENCE_ALL_ELIGIBLE

denominator_contract.never_mix: ticket-slot-level and target-level denominators are never mixed
denominator_contract.target_any_ticket_level: denominator = covered targets only (targets in window with >=1 valid slot)
denominator_contract.ticket_slot_level: denominator = valid submitted ticket slots whose target is in the window

_notes.EXACT_PRIZE_TIER: Structural tier is derivable from (main_hit_count, special_hit), but the committed prize-tier scorer semantics and an exact monetary tier mapping are NOT re-derived here; treat as partial.
_notes.PAYOUT_EV_ROI: No payout/odds/pool/ROI data is read or computed. A local scorer endpoint must never be converted into an official prize, payout, or ROI.

frozen_measurement_contract.measurement_only_notice: MEASUREMENT_AND_SCHEMA_FEASIBILITY_ONLY. Not a ranking, portfolio, random baseline, p-value, candidate classification, recommendation, prediction-success claim, payout, ROI, or official-prize statement. Rows are lexical and unranked.
frozen_measurement_contract.missing_coverage_rule: Missing target coverage stays missing: not imputed as zero-hit, not backfilled, not substituted; coverage denominator is published separately.

outcome_rederivation.main_hit_count: size of intersection(predicted 6 main, actual 6 main)
outcome_rederivation.source_of_truth: canonical draw numbers + actual special from draws_big_lotto_canonical_main
outcome_rederivation.special_hit: 1 if actual special number is in predicted 6 main numbers else 0

frozen_measurement_contract.pairwise_rule: Pairwise overlap uses numbers only; no outcome fields; lexical unranked.
frozen_measurement_contract.redundancy_rule: Structural diagnostics only; duplicate slots remain counted in ticket-slot metrics.
frozen_measurement_contract.reference_only_constraint: REFERENCE_ALL_ELIGIBLE is descriptive reference only and cannot support strategy promotion or selection.
frozen_measurement_contract.ticket_validity_rule: A ticket slot is VALID iff predicted_numbers parses to exactly 6 distinct integers in [1,49] AND history_cutoff_draw is strictly earlier (integer-less-than) than target_draw. Invalid slots are excluded from denominators and reported.

frozen_strategy_family.measurement_only_notice: MEASUREMENT_AND_SCHEMA_FEASIBILITY_ONLY. Not a ranking, portfolio, random baseline, p-value, candidate classification, recommendation, prediction-success claim, payout, ROI, or official-prize statement. Rows are lexical and unranked.

pairwise_ticket_overlap_diagnostics.note: Pairwise overlap uses NUMBERS ONLY; no outcome field is read. Lexical unranked.

endpoint_definitions.m2_and_special: main_hit_count == 2 AND special_hit == 1 (BIG649 '2 mains + special' prize tier)
endpoint_definitions.special_hit: actual special number is an element of the predicted 6 main numbers
